heading: Recruitment of Indian educators
label: 2014 Recruitment of Indian educators
text: The Secretary shall institute a policy for the recruitment of qualified Indian educators and a detailed plan to promote employees from within the Bureau. Such plan shall include opportunities for acquiring work experience prior to actual work assignment.
